backtest_metadata.hypothesis: S&P 500 deletion announcement → SHORT stock → underperforms SPY in 5 days
backtest_metadata.data_source: Wikipedia List of S&P 500 companies (effective dates -5 trading days = announcement date)
backtest_metadata.filter: excluded acquisitions, mergers, FDIC events; kept market-cap-change and organic deletions only
backtest_metadata.note: Dates are approximate — Wikipedia stores effective dates; announcement estimated as effective_date - 5 trading days

deletion_dataset.reason: TechnipFMC was removed from the S&P 500 in anticipation of its announced spin-off of Technip Energies.
Apartment Investment and Management (Aimco) spun off Apartment Income REIT.

errors.error: No data for FBHS around 2022-12-12 (tried yfinance and Tiingo)
No data for ADS around 2020-06-15 (tried yfinance and Tiingo)

backtest_results.skewness_warning_abnormal_1d: High skewness (-1.56) — t-test may be unreliable. Check Wilcoxon p-value for robustness.
backtest_results.multiple_testing_note: 3 horizons significant at p<0.05 — passes multi-horizon check.
